emails.subject: Re: Natasha-
emails.body: Re: Natasha- now, now, now- you're a 38 year-old man, and you're talking about serious issues- marriage and a family. hey, i'm the biggest kid you'll ever meet, but we're talking about my wife's best friend here, so pretend like she's my sister or something. claybus

emails.subject: Re: Natasha-
emails.body: Re: Natasha- Hey. It's international friend week. I'm sending Natasha an international friend email. I'll send you the email that I send her. Here is the profile I have built for her: 29 yr old, Teaches a children's Sunday School class, excellent piano player, believes in recycling, helps little old ladies across the street, loves arts and crafts shows, and bakes cookies! What do you think. What's your wife's name? I'm going to mention you and your wife in my email.
